features.name: Swarm
features.description: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny raven. The swarm can't regain Hit Points or gain Temporary Hit Points.

actions.name: Beaks
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage, or 2 (1d4) Piercing damage if the swarm is Bloodied.

actions.name: Cacophony (Recharge 6)
actions.description: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 10, one creature in the swarm's space. Failure: The target has the Deafened condition until the start of the swarm's next turn. While Deafened, the target also has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

tactical_info.combat_role: Aerial Controller - Flying swarm with debuff capabilities
tactical_info.positioning: Uses high flight speed and excellent perception for aerial control
tactical_info.damage_output: 5 piercing damage (2 when bloodied) plus Cacophony debuff
tactical_info.key_abilities: Cacophony for disadvantage infliction, exceptional perception (15)
tactical_info.synergies: Excellent scout and aerial harassment with debuff support
